---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Propose a new idea, tool integration, or enhancement for AuraGo
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem?
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I have to manually log into my router to see active LAN leases..."

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you're proposing a new tool integration (e.g. Pi-hole, Home Assistant scene trigger, etc.), describe how the tool behaves and what arguments it should accept.

## 🧱 Architectural Impact (Optional)
If applicable, how do you see this feature fitting into the existing architecture?
* Will it require a new core service in `internal/`?
* Will it be a modular, adapter-based tool under `internal/tools/`?
* Will it require new Vault-encrypted secrets or Web UI updates?

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered or tried.

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context, API documentation links, reference implementations, or screenshots about the feature request here.
